## [00:00 - 01:30]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Lumer and today we're going to talk about how to clone your voice with AI. Let's go! You can clone your voice with AI now. So I tried this with resemble.ai and ucan2. It's completely free to try out. So once you create your account, you'll need to submit between 3 and 25 audio samples. You do this by reading various sentences and phrases that the app gives you. When you're done, you'll need to wait usually like a day or two. And then when it's ready, you can type in some text and it will read it off as your AI-cloned voice. Here are some examples. I almost sound human, but I'm not. The brewers are better than the cubs. I'm still not sure what to think about AI-generated voices. Is this cool? I am an actual person and not a robot. Yeah, it's not perfect, but it is just a free trial. Of course, there are other features that you can use that I'm sure will make it sound better, but you gotta pay for them. So what do you think? So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Lumer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
